title: McDonald's India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: McDonald's India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
